node_naming.reason: All AC nodes prefixed ac1-/ac2-, setup nodes prefixed setup-

assertions.reason: ac1-assert-button-disabled uses strict eq on found+disabled; ac2-assert-buttons-restored uses strict eq on hasLong, hasShort, hasAddFunds

screenshots.reason: ac1-screenshot-submit-button and ac2-screenshot-market-detail both taken before assertions; before/after pairs captured for both ACs

no_forbidden_patterns.reason: No wait>500ms, no switch default skipping AC, no DOM-only visual claim

setup_via_eval.reason: Zero balance injected via sm.account.pushData() for both ACs — no UI navigation for setup

reverts_on_fix_revert.reason: With market-detail fix reverted, ac2-wait-cta-buttons times out (perps-trade-cta-buttons absent); with order-entry fix reverted, ac1-assert-button-disabled fails (disabled=false)

reasons: AC1 (order-entry submit disabled at zero balance) covered by ac1-* nodes with before/after screenshot pair
AC2 (market-detail Long/Short restoration) now covered by ac2-* nodes with before/after screenshot pair

better_version_guidance: Recipe covers both ACs with strict assertions and screenshot evidence. A stronger version could also verify that clicking Long/Short on market-detail navigates to the order-entry page, completing the full user journey.
